text:
Package Statistics 2024-25
- Highest Package Domestic: ₹42 LPA
- Highest Package International: ₹68 LPA
- Average Package Overall: ₹6.8 LPA
- Average Package CSE / AI&ML / Data Science: ₹9.2 LPA
- Average Package ECE / EEE: ₹5.4 LPA
- Average Package Mechanical / Civil / Petroleum: ₹4.2 LPA
- Average Package MBA: ₹7.5 LPA
- Average Package B.Pharmacy / M.Pharmacy: ₹4.8 LPA
- Median Package Overall: ₹5.5 LPA

Year-on-Year Placement Growth
- 2021-22: 75% placement rate — Average Package ₹4.2 LPA
- 2022-23: 82% placement rate — Average Package ₹5.1 LPA
- 2023-24: 87% placement rate — Average Package ₹6.1 LPA
- 2024-25: 90% placement rate — Average Package ₹6.8 LPA
- Growth: Consistent 3 to 5% improvement in placement rate year on year
- Package Growth: 15 to 18% average package increase year on year

Top Package Offers 2024-25
- ₹42 LPA: Leading product-based MNC — B.Tech CSE student
- ₹36 LPA: Top IT services company — B.Tech AI&ML student
- ₹28 LPA: Global consulting firm — MBA student
- ₹22 LPA: Semiconductor company — B.Tech ECE student
- ₹18 LPA: Core engineering firm — B.Tech EEE student
- ₹15 LPA: Pharma multinational — M.Pharmacy student

Placement by Package Slabs 2024-25
- Above ₹20 LPA: 48 students (4.3%)
- ₹10 LPA to ₹20 LPA: 187 students (16.8%)
- ₹5 LPA to ₹10 LPA: 534 students (47.8%)
- ₹3 LPA to ₹5 LPA: 298 students (26.7%)
- Below ₹3 LPA: 49 students (4.4%)

Placement by Sector 2024-25
- Information Technology and Software: 48%
- Banking Financial Services and Insurance (BFSI): 14%
- Core Engineering — Manufacturing, Automotive, Energy: 12%
- Consulting and Analytics: 10%
- Pharmaceutical and Healthcare: 7%
- E-Commerce and Startups: 5%
- Government and PSU: 4%

Internship Statistics 2024-25
- Total Students who Completed Internships: 960
- Internship to Pre-Placement Offer (PPO) Conversion Rate: 22%
- Top Internship Providers: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Amazon, Deloitte, SAP, Google Cloud
- Average Internship Stipend: ₹15,000 to ₹25,000 per month
- Duration: 2 months (Summer Internship) and 6 months (Final Year Project Internship)

Pre-Placement Training Program
- Aptitude and Reasoning Training: 60 hours
- Communication and Soft Skills: 40 hours
- Technical Training — Coding, DSA, Core Subjects: 80 hours
- Mock Interviews by Industry Professionals: 5 rounds per student
- Group Discussion Practice: Weekly sessions
- Resume Building Workshops: Conducted every semester

Placement Cell Contact
- Email: placements@adityauniversity.in
- Dean of Admissions: Dr. A. Rama Krishna — Cell: 76590 76662
- Associate Dean: Dr. R. Giri Prasad — Cell: 70950 76663
- Campus: Surampalem, East Godavari, Andhra Pradesh — 533437
